title: Silhouette Universe Collectible Poster AI
sourceTitle: Silhouette Universe Collectible Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable silhouette universe collectible poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable silhouette universe collectible poster built around lone astronaut figure. signature elements: a strong symbolic outer silhouette contains an inner narrative world instead of using a generic container worldbuilding: spiral galaxy and tiny exploration scenes should grow naturally inside lone astronaut figure, not sit like a pasted image composition: stable composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Painterly ink or watercolor language with visible paper texture, controlled detail, and refined hand-made finish. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition color palette: deep indigo with silver highlights controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: ink wash, watercolor bleeding, paper grain, and hand-rendered line texture typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations. title text: "OUTER QUIET" Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
